Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.grandparentTitle: WCMMA 22 - Dawid Zoltaszek v. Ahmed Tijani Shehu
Video.title: WCMMA 22 - Dawid Zoltaszek v. Ahmed Tijani Shehu

Image.alt: WCMMA 22 - Dawid Zoltaszek v. Ahmed Tijani Shehu
WCMMA 22 - Dawid Zoltaszek v. Ahmed Tijani Shehu
WCMMA 22 - Dawid Zoltaszek v. Ahmed Tijani Shehu

The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. Video.summary: Peter Arbeau brings strong Muay Thai influences to his MMA matches. After travelling the world over constantly seeing out new training and competition experiences, Peter is more than re//ady for his next fight at HK37. This is an intense bout against an equally skilled Matt Krayco, with fists and legs flying.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau
Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau
Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau

Video.summary: Motivated by watching UFC fights, Shawn Fitzsimmons was eager to start training in MMA. After a stint teaching self defense classes in Europe, Shawn is ready to prove his skills in the cage. As the main event at HK37, he takes on Ryan Dickson in the Lightweight division.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons

Image.alt: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Tom Theocharis at HK50
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Tom Theocharis
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Tom Theocharis

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Tom Theocharis
Out of the Cage - Tom Theocharis
Out of the Cage - Tom Theocharis

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Dale Tallman
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Dale Tallman
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Dale Tallman

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Dale Tallman
Fighter Profile: Dale Tallman
Fighter Profile: Dale Tallman

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda
